_note: Canonical NON-SECRET tenant identity for the SENIORS (cawgcap.org) Apps Script project. These map 1:1 to Script Properties consumed by getTenantConfig_() in src/config.gs. Secrets (SA_PRIVATE_KEY, MISSION_WEBHOOK_SECRET, CAPWATCH_AUTHORIZATION) are NOT stored here — see docs/ADMIN_GUIDE.md. This file is repo-only; .claspignore keeps config-tenants/ out of every clasp push.
